name: mistral-ocr4
description: Lean, tool-agnostic access layer for Mistral OCR4 + Document AI: a custom MCP server (OCR, structured annotations, bounding boxes, Files, Batch, generic passthrough), an extraction skill, intent-divining hooks, and a handoff seam for downstream RFP/vendor/invoice/submittal/engineering pipelines. Extraction only - reasoning stays with the calling model.
